teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective protect_partner.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 3) has not acted yet and may be able to beat a single heart later; with player 0 down to 2 cards, partner likely wants us to contest the lead to deny the opponent a cheap trick.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponent player 0 led a low single heart with only 2 cards remaining, suggesting a near-finish shed attempt; if player 0 wins this trick they may exit soon. Opponent players 2 and 3 still hold 3 cards each and may have higher hearts or trumps, so overcommitting a high card now is risky.
